# sand atelier

> sand atelier is a korean custom lettering sticker studio based in incheon, crafting handmade lettering stickers for birthdays, weddings, corporate events, and fandom celebrations since 2017.

the site is an archive and gallery of past sticker designs, organized by category, with consulting available through kakaotalk.

## pages

- [home](/): browse the full archive of custom lettering stickers, filter by category (birthday, wedding, corporate, fandom, and more), and request consulting.

## contact

- instagram (sand atelier): https://www.instagram.com/sand_atelier_sandwich/
- instagram (maison de laitue): https://www.instagram.com/maisondelaitue/
- newsletter: https://laitue.stibee.com/
- kakaotalk consulting: https://pf.kakao.com/_ZaNaxl/chat
